sections.paragraph: m. a thick wood, [“either as being cut, or”] from the Chaldee verb חֲרַשׁ to be entangled, חוּרְשָׁא a wood, חֲרִישׁוּתָא a thicket of trees, compare Sam. Oba 1:4 a wood, Isa 17:9 Eze 31:3. With ה parag. חֹרְשָׁה 1Sa 23:16, which is also retained with a preposition. בַּחֹרְשָׁה verses 15 1Sa 23:15, 18 1Sa 23:18pl. חֳרָשִׁים 2Ch 27:4.
